info.name: [Smoke] loan-origination-service
info.description:
API for managing loan application origination, underwriting decisions, and
document collection in the Lending domain. This service handles the full
lifecycle from application submission through approval or denial.

**Authentication:**
- Service-to-service: mTLS (mutual TLS)
- Internal gateway: JWT token (Bearer token)

**Rate Limits:**
- Standard: 200 requests/minute
- Batch operations: 50 requests/minute


Contact Support:
 Name: Lending Platform Team
 Email: lending-platform@example.com

request.description:
Initiates or re-initiates the underwriting evaluation for an application.
This is normally triggered automatically on application submission but
can be manually invoked for re-evaluation after document updates.

request.description:
Creates a new loan application with applicant information, requested
loan terms, and initial credit data. Triggers async underwriting
evaluation upon successful submission.

**Business Rules:**
- Applicant must be 18+ years old
- Requested amount must be between $1,000 and $500,000
- One active application per applicant per product type
